title: What Scripture Actually Means When It Says Walk Humbly
caption:
Walking humbly before God isn't walking small. Micah 6:8 never said shrink.

Most men hear "humble" and think quiet, small, apologize for taking up space. That's not humility. That's hiding.

Christ had every right in heaven and used none of it to save Himself. Humble looks like taking the correction without defending yourself for ten minutes first. It looks like staying low the week you're winning, not just the week you're broke.

#faith #humility #scripture #christianman #manofgod
